G

get(int) - Method in interface michaelryan.struct.extendablearrays.ExtendableArray
Returns the item at the specified index.
get(int) - Method in class michaelryan.struct.extendablearrays.ExtendableArrayImpl
 
get() - Method in class michaelryan.struct.queues.CircularArrayQueue
Returns the element at front of this queue while removing it from this queue.
get() - Method in interface michaelryan.struct.queues.Queue
Returns and removes the item at the front of this queue, or null if it's empty.
getData() - Method in class michaelryan.struct.queues.HeapPriorityQueue.Node
Returns the data held by this node.
getPriority() - Method in class michaelryan.struct.queues.HeapPriorityQueue.Node
Returns this node's priority.
getResult() - Method in class michaelryan.background.TaskCompleter
Returns the result of the task.
goLeft(int) - Method in class michaelryan.struct.queues.HeapPriorityQueue
Returns the index of the element that would be the left child of the node at the given index.
goRight(int) - Method in class michaelryan.struct.queues.HeapPriorityQueue
Returns the index of the element that would be the right child of the node at the given index.
goUp(int) - Method in class michaelryan.struct.queues.HeapPriorityQueue
Returns the index of the element that would be the parent of the node at the given index.
